_meta.purpose: Measured Mixtiles gallery-wall data → source for our LAYOUTS matrix (mapped to our 9 Gelato sizes). Numbers/patterns only — no competitor images/code/brand stored here.
_meta.validated: 2026-07-22: rigid named compositions, no reflow, fixed frame count, empty frames allowed, S/M/L = three separate collections (each wall has ONE size).
_meta.howToFill: Append one object per wall to walls[]. Positions (box%) are derived by Claude from clean empty-frame screenshots — do NOT hand-estimate them here.

photoMapping.note: TBD by Chrome: how 'Add N Photos' maps to cell count (demo prefill?), and how a portrait photo crops into a square cell (centre? repositionable?).

behavior.flow: pick a rigid named wall, fill with photos
behavior.reflow: none — deselecting a photo empties that cell in place; layout never shifts
behavior.frameCount: fixed per wall; clicking an empty cell only offers Upload/Import
behavior.sizeModel: S/M/L are separate collections, not per-product scale; each wall has one overallCm
